info.name: Tiphub Developer API
info.description:
# Tiphub Developer API

Complete API collection for the Tiphub financial market analysis platform.

## Getting Started

1. **Set base URL**: Update the `base_url` collection variable (default: `https://tiphub.ai`)
2. **Create an account**: Run the **Signup** or **Login** request — JWT tokens auto-save to collection variables
3. **Create an API key**: Run **Developer > Create API Key** — the key auto-saves to `api_key`
4. **Start exploring**: Most market data endpoints work with just the API key

## Authentication

| Method | Header | Used For |
|--------|--------|----------|
| **JWT Bearer** | `Authorization: Bearer <token>` | Web app endpoints (auth, subscription, admin, developer, saved results) |
| **API Key** | `X-API-Key: <key>` | Data API endpoints (market data, prices, screener, backtest, sentiment) |
| **None** | — | Public endpoints (health checks, config, subscription plans) |

## Rate Limits

| Tier | Requests/min | Screener/day | Backtest/day |
|------|-------------|--------------|--------------|
| Basic (Free) | 30 | 3 | 3 |
| Premium | 120 | Unlimited | Unlimited |

## Error Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 400 | Bad Request — invalid parameters |
| 401 | Unauthorized — missing or invalid token/key |
| 403 | Forbidden — insufficient tier or permissions |
| 404 | Not Found — resource doesn't exist |
| 409 | Conflict — duplicate resource |
| 429 | Too Many Requests — rate limit exceeded |
| 500 | Internal Server Error |

## SSE Streaming Endpoints

Screener, Backtest, Sentiment, and Chat endpoints use Server-Sent Events (SSE) for real-time progress.
Use the **Start** endpoint to get a task/job ID, then connect to the **Stream** endpoint.
Postman shows raw SSE text; for best results test SSE in browser or with `curl`.

item.name: Health Checks

request.description:
Check financial database (PostgreSQL) connectivity and connection pool status.

**Auth:** None
**Cache:** No

Check Redis cache health, hit rates, memory usage, and connection count.

**Auth:** None
**Cache:** No

item.description: System health monitoring endpoints. Check database, Redis cache, and overall service status. No authentication required.

item.name: Authentication

request.description:
Create a new user account with email and password.

**Auth:** None
**Rate Limit:** 3 per hour
**Note:** `termsAccepted` must be `true`. JWT tokens auto-save to collection variables via test script.

Login with email or username and password.

**Auth:** None
**Rate Limit:** 5 per 15 minutes
**Note:** Account locks after 5 failed attempts (30 min). Tokens auto-save via test script.

Get the authenticated user's profile information.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Cache:** No

response.name: 200 - User Profile
response.body:
{
  "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
  "email": "test@example.com",
  "username": "testuser",
  "name": "Test User",
  "avatarUrl": null,
  "provider": "password",
  "tier": "basic",
  "role": "user",
  "emailVerified": true,
  "phoneNumber": null,
  "subscriptionStatus": "none",
  "subscriptionPlanId": null,
  "trialEnd": null,
  "hadTrial": false,
  "createdAt": "2025-01-10T08:00:00.000Z"
}

request.description:
Exchange a refresh token for new access and refresh tokens.

**Auth:** None (uses refresh token in body)
**Rate Limit:** 20 per hour
**Note:** Tokens auto-save via test script.

Revoke the current session. Invalidates both access and refresh tokens server-side.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Check if a username is available for registration. Returns suggestions if taken.

**Auth:** None
**Rate Limit:** No

Request a password reset OTP sent to the user's email.

**Auth:** None
**Rate Limit:** 3 per hour per IP
**Dev Mode:** OTP returned in response as `devOtp`.

response.name: 200 - OTP Sent

request.description:
Verify OTP and set a new password.

**Auth:** None
**Note:** OTP is single-use and expires in 15 minutes. Max 5 verification attempts.

List all active sessions for the authenticated user.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

response.name: 200 - Sessions List

request.description:
Get the authenticated user's current usage limits and remaining quotas.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Check if Google OAuth is configured and available.

**Auth:** None
**Use:** Conditionally show "Sign in with Google" button.

Send a verification OTP to the authenticated user's email.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Rate Limit:** 3 per hour

response.name: 200 - OTP Sent

request.description:
Verify email address with OTP code.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Note:** OTP is single-use, expires in 15 minutes.

Request account deletion. Sends a confirmation OTP to email.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Warning:** Account deletion is permanent.

response.name: 200 - OTP Sent

request.description:
Confirm account deletion with OTP. Permanently deletes user data.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Warning:** This action cannot be undone.

Export all personal data (GDPR compliance). Returns user profile, sessions, and saved results.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Update user phone number (E.164 format).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Check if the user has a password set (OAuth users may not).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Revoke a specific session by ID.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Revoke all sessions except the current one.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

item.description: User authentication and session management. Supports email/password signup, login, JWT token refresh, Google OAuth, password reset via OTP, and session listing.

item.name: Market Data

request.description:
Get NSE (National Stock Exchange) market status.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 60 seconds
**Statuses:** PRE-MARKET, OPEN, POST-MARKET, CLOSED

Fear & Greed Index derived from synthetic VIX (Nifty 50 volatility).

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 15 minutes
**Range:** 0 (Extreme Fear) to 100 (Extreme Greed)

Top market gainers by percentage change.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 5 minutes
**Params:** `category` = GAINER or LOSER, `limit` = 1-20

Top market losers by percentage change.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 5 minutes

Top stocks by market cap with latest daily closing prices. Used for the scrolling ticker marquee on the homepage.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 30 minutes
**Params:** `limit` (default: 20)

Paginated stock list with fundamentals data. Filter by market capitalization.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 5 minutes
**Params:**
- `cap_type`: all, large, mid, small
- `search`: search by symbol or company name
- `page`: page number (default: 1)
- `limit`: results per page (default: 30)

Search stocks by symbol or company name within the stock browser.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 5 minutes

All 57 market indices with real-time prices from the ltp_live table.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 5 minutes
**Includes:** Nifty 50, Bank Nifty, sectoral indices, thematic indices.

Detailed data for a specific market index.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 5 minutes

Financial news articles for a stock from Google News.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 24 hours
**Params:** `ticker` — stock symbol (e.g., RELIANCE, TCS)

response.name: 200 - News Articles

item.description: Market overview data including NSE status, Fear & Greed index, top gainers/losers, paginated stock browser, market indices, and financial news.

item.name: Price Data

request.description:
Real-time Last Traded Price with intraday OHLC for a single stock.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 minute
**Source:** `ltp_live` table (cleared EOD)

Batch fetch LTP for multiple stock symbols in one request.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 minute
**Limit:** Max 100 symbols per request

Historical OHLC price data for charting.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 30 minutes
**Params:**
- `timeframe`: 1min, 1hour, 1day, 1week, 1month
- `months`: lookback period (default: 6)

Hourly OHLC data. Best for 1-3 month analysis windows.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 30 minutes

Batch fetch current prices by ticker IDs. Used internally by search results to enrich with live prices.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 minute
**Limit:** Max 100 ticker IDs

Get a unified stock quote combining real-time price (OHLC, LTP, change%), fundamentals (market cap, PE, sector, industry), and optional historical candles. Pass `timeframe` param (1hour, 1day, 1week, 1month) to include candles.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Params:**
- `timeframe`: 1hour, 1day, 1week, 1month (empty = no candles)
- `months`: lookback period for candles (default: 6)

Get unified quotes for multiple symbols at once (max 50). Invalid symbols are collected in an errors array.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Params:**
- `timeframe`: 1hour, 1day, 1week, 1month (empty = no candles)
- `months`: lookback period for candles (default: 6)
**Body:** `{ "symbols": ["RELIANCE", "TCS", ...] }`

response.name: Success - Bulk Quotes
response.body:

item.name: Search

request.description:
Fast stock search with 3-tier optimization: in-memory cache → ticker index → database.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 5 minutes
**Params:**
- `q`: search string (min 1 char)
- `limit`: max results (default: 50, max: 100)

response.name: 200 - Search Results

request.description:
List all ticker symbols from the database.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 hour
**Params:** `limit` — max results

response.name: 200 - Tickers

request.description:
Tickers that have OHLC hourly data available (for backtesting and screening).

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 24 hours

response.name: 200 - Tickers

request.description:
Equity tickers from NSE only (filtered by `-EQ` suffix).

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 hour

item.description: Stock search and ticker listing endpoints. Fast 3-tier search, full ticker lists, NSE-filtered tickers, and tickers with hourly data available.

item.name: Stock Detail

request.description:
Comprehensive stock page data: fundamentals, financials, company info.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 hour
**Returns:** Full stock_fundamentals row + ticker info.

response.name: 200 - Stock Detail
response.body:
{
  "ticker": {
    "id": 1,
    "symbol": "RELIANCE",
    "name": "Reliance Industries Ltd",

request.description:
External analyst ratings from Yahoo Finance. This endpoint is slow (10-20s) as it scrapes live data.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 hour

24 technical indicators calculated on-the-fly from 300 bars of hourly OHLC data.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 5 minutes
**Indicators:** SMA (20/50/100/200), EMA (9/12/26/50/200), MACD, RSI 14, ATR 14, Supertrend, Bollinger Bands, Volume SMA.

7-dimension stock quality scorecard with scores for valuation, profitability, growth, momentum, financial health, dividend, and analyst sentiment.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 hour

response.name: 200 - Scorecard

request.description:
Reverse DCF valuation model. Calculates the implied growth rate the market is pricing in, or finds the implied price for a target growth rate.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Params:**
- `wacc`: Weighted Average Cost of Capital (default: 0.10)
- `terminal_growth`: Terminal growth rate (default: 0.03)
- `forecast_years`: Projection period (default: 5)
- `target_price`: If set, shows implied growth for that price

Get available fiscal years for financial Sankey flow diagrams.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)

Income statement Sankey flow diagram data showing revenue → expenses → profit breakdown.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Params:** `year` (query param) to select specific fiscal year.

Quarterly shareholding pattern breakdown (promoters, FII, DII, public).

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 hour

Aggregated analyst recommendations and research reports across all covered stocks.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 hour

item.description: Comprehensive stock analysis: fundamentals, external analyst data, technical indicators, quality scorecard, DCF valuation, financial Sankey diagrams, shareholding patterns.

item.name: Technical Analysis

request.description:
Pre-built screener expression templates.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** Static

response.name: 200 - Templates

request.description:
All available ticker symbols for screening.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 1 hour

Validate a screener expression without running it. Checks AST syntax and indicator names.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)

Start an async screener job. Returns a `job_id` for SSE progress streaming.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Rate Limit:** 3/day (basic), unlimited (premium)
**Processing time:** 20-180 seconds depending on stock count.
**Note:** Auto-saves job_id to `test_task_id` via test script.

SSE stream for screener progress. Connect after starting a job.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Events:** `connected`, `progress`, `result`, `complete`, `error`
**Heartbeat:** Every 5 seconds
**Note:** Postman shows raw SSE text. For best results, test in browser.

response.name: 200 - SSE Stream (text/event-stream)

request.description:
Cancel a running screener job.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)

Screen stocks by fundamental financial metrics.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Operators:** `>`, `<`, `>=`, `<=`, `=`
**Fields:** All `stock_fundamentals` columns (trailing_pe, market_cap, dividend_yield, etc.)

item.description: Expert screener for technical analysis. Validate and run boolean expressions against 2800+ stocks. Supports async SSE streaming and pre-built templates. Includes fundamental screening.

item.name: Strategy Backtesting

request.description:
Start an async GA (Genetic Algorithm) strategy backtest via Celery.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Rate Limit:** 3/day (basic), unlimited (premium)
**Modes:** `standard` (GA entry/exit), `advanced` (TPSL optimization), `hybrid` (client GPU + server optimizer)
**Processing:** 30-120 seconds
**Note:** Auto-saves task_id via test script.

Poll backtest task status (alternative to SSE streaming).

**Auth:** API Key (optional)

SSE stream for real-time backtest progress.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Events:** `connected`, `status`, `progress`, `complete`, `error`
**Progress phases:** `fetching_data`, `computing_indicators`, `optimizing`

response.name: 200 - SSE Stream

request.description:
Cancel a running backtest task.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)

Synchronous standard GA backtest. May timeout for long-running backtests — prefer async `start` endpoint.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Timeout:** 120 seconds

Synchronous TPSL (Take-Profit / Stop-Loss) optimization backtest.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Timeout:** 120 seconds
**Output:** Includes optimized `target_pct` and `stop_pct` values.

item.description: Genetic Algorithm (GA) based strategy backtesting. Standard mode, TPSL optimization, and hybrid (client GPU) mode. Async via Celery with SSE progress streaming.

item.name: Sentiment Analysis

request.description:
Synchronous ML sentiment analysis using FinBERT model on Google News articles.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 24 hours
**Processing:** 5-15 seconds (ML inference)

response.name: 200 - Sentiment Result

request.description:
Start async sentiment analysis via Celery. Returns cached result immediately if available.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Note:** Auto-saves task_id via test script.

Poll sentiment task status.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)

SSE stream for sentiment analysis progress.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Events:** `connected`, `status`, `progress`, `complete`, `error`, `cancelled`

response.name: 200 - SSE Stream

request.description:
Cancel a running sentiment analysis task.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)

item.description: ML-powered sentiment analysis using FinBERT on Google News articles. Sync and async modes with 24-hour caching.

item.name: AI Chat (TipTease)

request.description:
Get today's market summary and a contextual hint for the AI chat.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Cache:** 15 minutes

response.name: 200 - Summary

request.description:
Start an AI chat conversation. Returns a `stream_id` for SSE streaming of the response.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Note:** Pass conversation history in `history` array for context continuity.

SSE stream for AI chat response tokens.

**Auth:** API Key (optional)
**Events:** `token` (partial text), `done` (stream complete), `error`

response.name: 200 - SSE Stream

item.description: AI-powered market chat assistant. Get market summaries and ask questions about stocks, trends, and strategy. Responses streamed via SSE.

item.name: Subscription

request.description:
Get all active subscription plans. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

**Auth:** None
**Cache:** 30 minutes

response.name: 200 - Plans

request.description:
Get details for a specific subscription plan.

**Auth:** None

response.name: 200 - Plan Detail
response.body:
{
  "id": "premium_monthly",

  "tier": "premium",
  "price_cents": 49900,

request.description:
Get the authenticated user's current subscription status.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

response.name: 200 - Subscription
response.body:
{
  "tier": "basic",
  "subscription_status": "none",
  "subscription_plan_id": null,
  "subscription_start": null,
  "subscription_end": null,
  "trial_end": null,
  "had_trial": false,
  "cancel_at_period_end": false
}

request.description:
Check if the user is eligible to start a free trial.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Start a 7-day free premium trial.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Note:** Each user can only trial once (`had_trial` flag prevents re-trialing).

response.name: 400 - Already Trialed

request.description:
Cancel subscription at end of billing period (graceful cancellation).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Note:** Access continues until `subscription_end` date.

response.name: 200 - Cancelled

request.description:
Get subscription event history (trial starts, cancellations, upgrades, downgrades).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Params:** `limit` (default: 20)

item.description: Subscription plan management. View plans, check trial eligibility, start free trials, cancel subscriptions, and view history.

item.name: Developer (API Keys)

exec: console.log('API Key saved! COPY THIS - shown only once: ' + data.key);

request.description:
Create a new API key for programmatic access.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Important:** The full key is shown ONCE in the response. It auto-saves to `api_key` collection variable via test script.
**Limit:** 5 keys per user.

response.name: 400 - Limit Reached

request.description:
List all API keys for the authenticated user. Shows prefix only, not full key.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Get detailed information about a specific API key.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Update an API key's name or allowed origins.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Permanently revoke an API key. This action cannot be undone.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Rotate an API key — revokes the old key and generates a new one with the same settings.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Important:** The new full key is shown ONCE.

Aggregated API usage statistics across all keys.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Params:** `period` = 24h, 7d, 30d, 90d

API usage statistics for a specific key.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Params:** `period` = 24h, 7d, 30d, 90d

Reveal the full API key (only for keys created after the encrypted_key feature was added).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Note:** Only works if the key was stored with AES-256-GCM encryption.

response.name: 404 - Cannot Reveal

item.description: API key lifecycle management. Create, list, update, rotate, and revoke API keys. View usage statistics per key or aggregated.

item.name: Saved Results

request.description:
List saved expert screener results for the authenticated user.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Params:** `limit` (default: 20), `offset` (default: 0)

List saved strategy backtest results for the authenticated user.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer
**Params:** `limit` (default: 20), `offset` (default: 0)

Access a shared screener result via public share token. No authentication required.

**Auth:** None
**Param:** `:token` — the share token from a saved result.

Access a shared backtest result via public share token. No authentication required.

**Auth:** None
**Param:** `:token` — the share token.

Save an expert screener result.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Delete a saved screener result.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Generate a public share link for a saved screener result.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Save a strategy backtest result.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Delete a saved backtest result.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

Generate a public share link for a saved backtest result.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer

item.description: Save and share screener and backtest results. Public sharing via unique tokens.

item.name: App Config

request.description:
Get enabled/disabled pages configuration. Used by frontend to show/hide navigation items.

**Auth:** None

response.name: 200 - Page Config

request.description:
Feature availability per subscription tier.

**Auth:** None

item.description: Application configuration. Page visibility settings and feature availability per subscription tier.

item.name: Admin

request.description:
Admin dashboard overview: user counts, activity metrics, system health.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)

Paginated list of all users.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)
**Params:** `limit`, `offset`, `search`, `tier`, `role`

Detailed user information for admin view.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)

Update a user's role (admin privilege management).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)
**Roles:** user, moderator, admin

List all API keys across all users (admin view).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)
**Params:** `limit`, `status`

System-wide audit log of admin actions.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)
**Params:** `limit`, `action`, `actor_id`

Authentication event log (logins, failures, lockouts, OTP events).

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)
**Params:** `limit`, `event_type`, `user_id`

Get all feature flags and their current values.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)

response.name: 200 - Feature Flags

request.description:
Get current rate limit configuration for all tiers.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)

Get system-wide configuration values.

**Auth:** JWT Bearer (admin role required)

item.description: Admin-only endpoints for user management, audit logs, authentication logs, feature flags, rate limit configuration, and system settings. Requires admin role.

item.name: System (Protected)

request.description:
Redis memory, connections, key count, and hit/miss statistics.

**Auth:** Admin API Key
